title: LATTES 5.0: A conversation for every woman in every season - FinancialEDGE
description: Stanbic IBTC Pension Managers, a subsidiary of Stanbic IBTC Holdings PLC, is set to host another impactful edition of the Ladies At The Table Empowerment Series (LATTES), a flagship women’s initiative taking centre stage during the much-anticipated Bloom Weekend, scheduled to take place on Saturday, 21 June 2025 at Harbour Point, 4 Wilmot Point Road,
html: Stanbic IBTC Pension Managers, a subsidiary of Stanbic IBTC Holdings PLC, is set to host another impactful edition of the Ladies At The Table Empowerment Series (LATTES), a flagship women’s initiative taking centre stage during the much-anticipated Bloom Weekend, scheduled to take place on Saturday, 21 June 2025 at Harbour Point, 4 Wilmot Point Road, Victoria Island, Lagos.
